CONFIDENTIAL — Project Aurora

To: Treasury + Compliance
From: Token Counsel
Date: 24 May 2026

Re: Mainnet launch + exchange-listing schedule

The Project Aurora mainnet launch is targeted for Q3. The token generation event has been
provisionally scheduled internally for 14 August 2026; the airdrop schedule for early
contributors has been signed off by the board.

We expect to be listed on Binance shortly after TGE. The Bybit listing decision is still
under review with their compliance desk.

Counsel separately confirms no Wells notice has been received from the SEC; the prior
exchange listing decision in Singapore is unaffected.
